Title: Verify homepage elements
Test Steps:
1. Verify the presence of the homepage.
2. Verify the presence of the "Impostazioni" button.
3. Verify the presence of the "Nuovo luogo" button.
4. Verify the presence of the "Luogo dettagliato" button.
5. Verify the presence of the "Pathfinder" button.
Expected Result: All buttons are present on the homepage.

Title: Verify navigation to settings page
Preconditions: The application is launched and the homepage is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Impostazioni" button.
2. Verify the transition to the settings page.

Title: Verify navigation to location details page
Preconditions: The application is launched and the homepage is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Click on a location from the list of locations.
2. Verify the transition to the location details page.
Expected Result: The location details page is displayed.

Title: Verify navigation to Pathfinder page
Preconditions: The application is launched and the homepage is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Pathfinder" button.
2. Verify the transition to the Pathfinder page.

Title: Verify swipe up action
Preconditions: The application is launched and the homepage is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Swipe up on the homepage.
2. Verify the transition back to the homepage.

Title: Verify navigation to system map
Preconditions: The user is on a location details page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Navigate" button.
2. Verify the transition to the system map.

Title: Verify navigation to Yelp site
Preconditions: The user is on a location details page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Navigate" button.
2. Click on the "Open in Browser" option.
3. Verify the transition to the Yelp site.

Title: Verify call functionality
Preconditions: The user is on a location details page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Navigate" button.
2. Click on the "Call Business" option.
3. Verify the initiation of a call to the business.

Title: Verify back action
Preconditions: The user is on a location details page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Navigate" button.
2. Click on the "Indietro" button.
3. Verify the transition back to the homepage.

Title: Verify like/dislike functionality
Preconditions: The user is on a location details page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Like/Dislike" button.
2. Verify the modification of preferences.

Title: Verify preferences modification
Preconditions: The user is on a location details page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Like/Dislike" button.
2. Verify the transition to the preferences modification screen.
3. Make changes to the preferences.
4. Verify the successful saving of the preferences.

Title: Verify Pathfinder functionality
Preconditions: The user is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. Verify the initial display of the Pathfinder page.
2. Click on the "Indietro" button.
3. Verify the transition back to the homepage.

Title: Verify question display
Preconditions: The user is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. Do not click on the "Indietro" button.
2. Verify the display of a question.

Title: Verify response selection
Preconditions: The user is on the Pathfinder page and a question is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Select a response to the question.
2. Verify the display of a suggested location (if available).
Expected Result: A suggested location is displayed (if available).

Title: Verify no suggestion available
Preconditions: The user is on the Pathfinder page and a question is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Select a response to the question.
2. Verify the absence of a suggested location.
